cppspmd_sse.h:64:	#define _mm_undefined_ps _mm_setzero_ps

cppspmd_sse.h:127:template <typename N> void aligned_delete(N* p) { if (p) { p->~N(); _mm_free(p); } }

cppspmd_sse.h:168:	// Input is not a mask, but MSB bits - so emulate _mm_blendv_ps() by replicating bit 31.
cppspmd_sse.h:169:	mask = _mm_castsi128_ps(_mm_srai_epi32(_mm_castps_si128(mask), 31));

cppspmd_sse.h:1105:		if (mask & 1) v = _mm_load_ss(pSrc);
cppspmd_sse.h:1106:		if (mask & 2) v = _mm_insert_ps(v, _mm_load_ss(pSrc + stride), 0x10);
cppspmd_sse.h:1107:		if (mask & 4) v = _mm_insert_ps(v, _mm_load_ss(pSrc + 2 * stride), 0x20);
cppspmd_sse.h:1108:		if (mask & 8) v = _mm_insert_ps(v, _mm_load_ss(pSrc + 3 * stride), 0x30);
cppspmd_sse.h:1121:		return vint{ _mm_load_si128((__m128i*)vals) };
cppspmd_sse.h:1124:		__m128 v = _mm_load_ss(pSrcF);
cppspmd_sse.h:1125:		v = _mm_insert_ps(v, _mm_load_ss(pSrcF + stride), 0x10);
cppspmd_sse.h:1126:		v = _mm_insert_ps(v, _mm_load_ss(pSrcF + 2 * stride), 0x20);
cppspmd_sse.h:1127:		v = _mm_insert_ps(v, _mm_load_ss(pSrcF + 3 * stride), 0x30);
cppspmd_sse.h:1128:		return vint{ _mm_castps_si128(v) };
cppspmd_sse.h:1140:		return vfloat{ _mm_load_ps(vals) };
cppspmd_sse.h:1142:		__m128 v = _mm_load_ss(pSrc);
cppspmd_sse.h:1143:		v = _mm_insert_ps(v, _mm_load_ss(pSrc + stride), 0x10);
cppspmd_sse.h:1144:		v = _mm_insert_ps(v, _mm_load_ss(pSrc + 2 * stride), 0x20);
cppspmd_sse.h:1145:		v = _mm_insert_ps(v, _mm_load_ss(pSrc + 3 * stride), 0x30);
cppspmd_sse.h:1153:		int mask = _mm_movemask_ps(_mm_castsi128_ps(m_exec.m_mask));
cppspmd_sse.h:1155:		if (mask & 1) ((int *)(&dst.m_pValue[extract_x(dst.m_vindex)]))[0] = extract_x(_mm_castps_si128(src.m_value));
cppspmd_sse.h:1156:		if (mask & 2) ((int *)(&dst.m_pValue[extract_y(dst.m_vindex)]))[1] = extract_y(_mm_castps_si128(src.m_value));
cppspmd_sse.h:1157:		if (mask & 4) ((int *)(&dst.m_pValue[extract_z(dst.m_vindex)]))[2] = extract_z(_mm_castps_si128(src.m_value));
cppspmd_sse.h:1158:		if (mask & 8) ((int *)(&dst.m_pValue[extract_w(dst.m_vindex)]))[3] = extract_w(_mm_castps_si128(src.m_value));
cppspmd_sse.h:1166:		int mask = _mm_movemask_ps(_mm_castsi128_ps(m_exec.m_mask));
cppspmd_sse.h:1168:		__m128i k = _mm_setzero_si128();
cppspmd_sse.h:1175:		return vfloat{ _mm_castsi128_ps(k) };
cppspmd_sse.h:1181:		int mask = _mm_movemask_ps(_mm_castsi128_ps(m_exec.m_mask));
cppspmd_sse.h:1194:		int mask = _mm_movemask_ps(_mm_castsi128_ps(m_exec.m_mask));
cppspmd_sse.h:1196:		__m128i k = _mm_setzero_si128();
cppspmd_sse.h:1209:		__m128i k = _mm_setzero_si128();
cppspmd_sse.h:1230:			return vfloat{ _mm_cvtepi32_ps(m_value) };
cppspmd_sse.h:1240:			return _mm_cvtsi128_si32(m_value);
cppspmd_sse.h:1273:	const lint program_index = lint{ _mm_set_epi32( 3, 2, 1, 0 ) };
cppspmd_sse.h:1326:		__m128 k3210 = _mm_castsi128_ps(blendv_mask_epi32(_mm_setzero_si128(), _mm_castps_si128(v.m_value), m_exec.m_mask));
cppspmd_sse.h:1327:		__m128 temp = _mm_add_ps(_mm_shuffle_ps(k3210, k3210, _MM_SHUFFLE(0, 1, 2, 3)), k3210);
cppspmd_sse.h:1328:		return _mm_cvtss_f32(_mm_add_ss(_mm_movehl_ps(temp, temp), temp));
cppspmd_sse.h:1333:		__m128i k3210 = blendv_mask_epi32(_mm_setzero_si128(), v.m_value, m_exec.m_mask);
cppspmd_sse.h:1334:		__m128i temp = _mm_add_epi32(_mm_shuffle_epi32(k3210, _MM_SHUFFLE(0, 1, 2, 3)), k3210);
cppspmd_sse.h:1335:		return extract_x(_mm_add_epi32(_mm_castps_si128(_mm_movehl_ps(_mm_castsi128_ps(temp), _mm_castsi128_ps(temp))), temp));
cppspmd_sse.h:1358:	return vfloat { _mm_and_ps( _mm_castsi128_ps(m_value), *(const __m128 *)g_onef_128 ) };
cppspmd_sse.h:1369:	return vbool{ _mm_castps_si128(_mm_xor_ps(_mm_load_ps((const float*)g_allones_128), _mm_castsi128_ps(v.m_value))) };
cppspmd_sse.h:1374:CPPSPMD_FORCE_INLINE exec_mask operator^(const exec_mask& a, const exec_mask& b) { return exec_mask{ _mm_xor_si128(a.m_mask, b.m_mask) }; }
cppspmd_sse.h:1375:CPPSPMD_FORCE_INLINE exec_mask operator&(const exec_mask& a, const exec_mask& b) {	return exec_mask{ _mm_and_si128(a.m_mask, b.m_mask) }; }
cppspmd_sse.h:1376:CPPSPMD_FORCE_INLINE exec_mask operator|(const exec_mask& a, const exec_mask& b) { return exec_mask{ _mm_or_si128(a.m_mask, b.m_mask) }; }
cppspmd_sse.h:1378:CPPSPMD_FORCE_INLINE bool all(const exec_mask& e) { return _mm_movemask_ps(_mm_castsi128_ps(e.m_mask)) == ALL_ON_MOVEMASK; }
cppspmd_sse.h:1379:CPPSPMD_FORCE_INLINE bool any(const exec_mask& e) { return _mm_movemask_ps(_mm_castsi128_ps(e.m_mask)) != 0; }
cppspmd_sse.h:1382:CPPSPMD_FORCE_INLINE bool all(const vbool& e) { return _mm_movemask_ps(_mm_castsi128_ps(e.m_value)) == ALL_ON_MOVEMASK; }
cppspmd_sse.h:1383:CPPSPMD_FORCE_INLINE bool any(const vbool& e) { return _mm_movemask_ps(_mm_castsi128_ps(e.m_value)) != 0; }

cppspmd_sse.h:1386:CPPSPMD_FORCE_INLINE vbool operator||(const vbool& a, const vbool& b) { return vbool{ _mm_or_si128(a.m_value, b.m_value) }; }
cppspmd_sse.h:1387:CPPSPMD_FORCE_INLINE vbool operator&&(const vbool& a, const vbool& b) { return vbool{ _mm_and_si128(a.m_value, b.m_value) }; }
cppspmd_sse.h:1389:CPPSPMD_FORCE_INLINE vfloat operator+(const vfloat& a, const vfloat& b) { return vfloat{ _mm_add_ps(a.m_value, b.m_value) }; }

cppspmd_sse.h:1400:CPPSPMD_FORCE_INLINE vfloat operator*(const vfloat& a, const vfloat& b) { return vfloat{ _mm_mul_ps(a.m_value, b.m_value) }; }

cppspmd_sse.h:1436:CPPSPMD_FORCE_INLINE vfloat max(const vfloat& a, const vfloat& b) { return vfloat{ _mm_max_ps(a.m_value, b.m_value) }; }
cppspmd_sse.h:1437:CPPSPMD_FORCE_INLINE vfloat min(const vfloat& a, const vfloat& b) {	return vfloat{ _mm_min_ps(a.m_value, b.m_value) }; }
cppspmd_sse.h:1442:	__m128i abs_a = _mm_and_si128(_mm_castps_si128(a.m_value), _mm_set1_epi32(0x7FFFFFFFU) );
cppspmd_sse.h:1443:	__m128i has_fractional = _mm_cmplt_epi32(abs_a, _mm_castps_si128(_mm_set1_ps(8388608.0f)));
cppspmd_sse.h:1445:	__m128i ai = _mm_cvttps_epi32(a.m_value);
cppspmd_sse.h:1447:	__m128 af = _mm_cvtepi32_ps(ai);
cppspmd_sse.h:1448:	return vfloat{ blendv_mask_ps(a.m_value, af, _mm_castsi128_ps(has_fractional)) };
cppspmd_sse.h:1453:	__m128i abs_a = _mm_and_si128(_mm_castps_si128(a.m_value), _mm_set1_epi32(0x7FFFFFFFU));
cppspmd_sse.h:1454:	__m128i has_fractional = _mm_cmplt_epi32(abs_a, _mm_castps_si128(_mm_set1_ps(8388608.0f)));
cppspmd_sse.h:1456:	__m128i ai = _mm_cvtps_epi32(a.m_value);
cppspmd_sse.h:1457:	__m128 af = _mm_cvtepi32_ps(ai);
cppspmd_sse.h:1458:	__m128 changed = _mm_cvtepi32_ps(_mm_castps_si128(_mm_cmpgt_ps(af, a.m_value)));
cppspmd_sse.h:1460:	af = _mm_add_ps(af, changed);
cppspmd_sse.h:1462:	return vfloat{ blendv_mask_ps(a.m_value, af, _mm_castsi128_ps(has_fractional)) };
cppspmd_sse.h:1467:	__m128i abs_a = _mm_and_si128(_mm_castps_si128(a.m_value), _mm_set1_epi32(0x7FFFFFFFU));
cppspmd_sse.h:1468:	__m128i has_fractional = _mm_cmplt_epi32(abs_a, _mm_castps_si128(_mm_set1_ps(8388608.0f)));
cppspmd_sse.h:1470:	__m128i ai = _mm_cvtps_epi32(a.m_value);
cppspmd_sse.h:1471:	__m128 af = _mm_cvtepi32_ps(ai);
cppspmd_sse.h:1472:	__m128 changed = _mm_cvtepi32_ps(_mm_castps_si128(_mm_cmplt_ps(af, a.m_value)));
cppspmd_sse.h:1474:	af = _mm_sub_ps(af, changed);
cppspmd_sse.h:1476:	return vfloat{ blendv_mask_ps(a.m_value, af, _mm_castsi128_ps(has_fractional)) };
cppspmd_sse.h:1493:	return _mm_sub_ps(_mm_add_ps(a, b), b);
cppspmd_sse.h:1502:	__m128i no_fract_fp_bits = _mm_castps_si128(_mm_set1_ps(8388608.0f));

cppspmd_sse.h:1505:	__m128 force_int = _mm_castsi128_ps(_mm_or_si128(no_fract_fp_bits, sign_a));
cppspmd_sse.h:1507:	// Can't use individual _mm_add_ps/_mm_sub_ps - this will be optimized out with /fp:fast by clang and probably other compilers.
cppspmd_sse.h:1508:	//__m128 temp1 = _mm_add_ps(a.m_value, force_int);

cppspmd_sse.h:1514:	return vfloat{ blendv_mask_ps(a.m_value, temp2, _mm_castsi128_ps(has_fractional)) };
